query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_likes FROM likes; SELECT s.title, COUNT(l.id) as like_count FROM songs s LEFT JOIN likes l ON s.id = l.songId GROUP BY s.id, s.title ORDER BY like_count DESC LIMIT 10;
